name: How much could I get for a back injury from falling at work?

mainEntity.name: How much could I get for a back injury from falling at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: $20k-$50k typical for back in UT workers' comp, based on wages/medical/impairment.
acceptedAnswer.description: Workers' comp settlements in Utah average $20,000-$50,000 for back injuries but vary by medical costs, lost wages, impairment rating, and return-to-work ability. No pain/suffering damages, only economic losses[10]. Key factors: TTD max $1,100/week, PPI based on AMA guides; multiply impairment % by body part value. Get full medical evaluation, negotiate via attorney. Comparable cases settle post-MMI (maximum medical improvement).

description: $20k-$50k typical for back in UT workers' comp, based on wages/medical/impairment.
